dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCardsHint: Create a topic and add some cards to get started.

study.title: Study Session
study.noCardsDueNow: No cards are due right now.

cards.title: Cards
cards.noCardsYet: No cards yet. Create a card to get started.

cardDetail.question: Question
cardDetail.resetMessage: This will reset the Bloom and FSRS state to their initial values and delete all review history for this card.
cardDetail.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete this card and all its review history.

cardEditor.conceptPlaceholder: Plain-text summary of the concept (used for embeddings & search)

topics.title: Topics
topics.noTopicsYet: No topics yet. Create one to get started.
topics.name: Name
topics.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Child topics will become root topics.
topics.noCardsInTopic: No cards in this topic yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, appearance, billing, and MCP integration

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Display Name
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.taxNote: Prices include all taxes. No VAT is shown (small business exemption per § 6(1)(27) UStG).
subscription.successBanner: Subscription activated! Thank you for supporting LearnForge.
subscription.canceledBanner: Checkout was canceled. You can try again anytime.
subscription.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
subscription.portalFailed: Failed to open billing portal. Please try again.

donation.title: Support LearnForge
donation.description: LearnForge is an early-stage project. If you'd like to support development, you can make a one-time donation.

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Download all your topics, cards, review history, and images as a ZIP file.
export.failed: Failed to export data. Please try again.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Required for AI assistants that don't support OAuth, such as Gemini, Cursor, or other MCP clients. Claude users can skip this — Claude connects via OAuth automatically.
apiKey.saveDescription: This key will only be shown once. Copy it now and store it securely.

claude.title: Claude (claude.ai) Setup
claude.step2: Scroll down and click <bold>Add custom connector</bold>
claude.step5: You will be redirected to sign in with your LearnForge credentials
claude.step6: In a conversation, click the <bold>+</bold> button, select <bold>Connectors</bold>, and toggle LearnForge on
claude.note: Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 — no API key needed. Works on any Claude plan, including the free tier.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all data (topics, cards, reviews, images). This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: All your topics, cards, reviews, and images will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

subscriptionBanner.message: Your trial has expired. Subscribe to continue creating and studying.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Create your first topic and flashcard in under a minute. We'll guide you through each step.
onboarding.chooseTitle: How do you want to get started?
onboarding.chooseDescription: You can connect Claude for AI-powered learning or create your first card manually.
onboarding.claudeOptionDesc: Claude creates rich visual cards, runs adaptive study sessions, and tracks your learning progress.
onboarding.manualOptionDesc: Write a simple question & answer card. You can connect Claude later in Settings.
onboarding.claudeSetupDesc: Add LearnForge as a connector in Claude. It only takes a minute.
onboarding.claudeStep4: Sign in with your LearnForge credentials — done!
onboarding.claudeNote: No API key needed — authentication is automatic via OAuth.
onboarding.claudeOtherAi: Using another AI tool? Generate an API key in Settings.
onboarding.doneClaudePrompt: Create a topic about [your subject] with a few flashcards
onboarding.topicDescription: Topics organize your flashcards. Start with one subject you want to learn.
onboarding.cardDescription: Write a simple question and answer. You can create more detailed cards later.
onboarding.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What is the primary function of photosynthesis?
onboarding.answerPlaceholder: e.g. Photosynthesis converts light energy into chemical energy (glucose), using carbon dioxide and water.
onboarding.doneDescription: Your first topic and card are ready. Start a study session or explore the dashboard.
onboarding.doneConnectTip: Tip: Connect Claude in Settings for AI-powered card creation.
